description.unified: 모든 적에게 물리 피해를 입히고 밀어냅니다. 이 스킬은 일반 공격으로 적용됩니다.
Deals Physical Damage 3 time to enemies in front. Each hit knocks them down for [2 sec->1 sec] and [(added) increases Physical Damage taken by 8% for 7 sec. This effect stacks up to 3 times].
임의의 적과 주변 범위의 적들에게 물리 피해를 5회 입히고 8초간 공격 속도를 [400->12%] 감소시킵니다. 영웅이 아닐 경우 추가 물리 피해를 입힙니다.
일반 공격 시, 추가 탄환을 발사하여 모든 적에게 추가 물리 피해를 입히고, [60% chance->(removed)] [(added) 10초간 공격력을 0.5% 증가시킵니다. 공격력 증가 효과는 최대 100회 중첩되며, 해제할 수 없습니다].

light.unified: If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by 100%. [(removed) Increase P.DMG target takes by 25% for 10 sec]

dark.unified: Attack increases by [35%->50%] for [10 sec->4 sec].
Damage dealt is reduced by 30%, but the number of hits is doubled. [(removed) Removes ATK Spd debuff and adds 3 sec Stun]

light.unified: Has a 15% chance to stun the target for 1 sec. [(removed) Increases ATK by 0.5% per Crit Hit up to 100 times]

dark.unified: Damage dealt is reduced by 30%, but the number of hits is doubled. [(removed) Activation chance changes to 80%]

description.unified: [Roll Over] increases DMG by {0}% on every use and recovers 120 MP upon a Crit Hit. This effect Stacks up to max 10 times.
[Miruru Pirates!] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0}%.
[Boooooom!] increases DMG by 50% and boosts ATK Spd by [{0}->{0}%] for 3 sec upon activation.

dark.unified: On hit, gains [Darkness] stacks equal to the number of enemies struck. When [Darkness] reaches 50 stacks, all [Darkness] is removed and you enter [Rampage] for 10 sec, increasing Attack Speed by [800->48%] and Attack by [20%->25%].

description.unified: When using [KABOOM!] attacks, has a [50%->30%] chance to deal additional Physical Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power and increase the target's Physical Damage taken by {1}% for 10 sec.
Summons the Soul of Ultimate Weapon, Leviathan for 10sec, increasing own ATK by [30%->45%]. Every 3sec, deals Physical Damage to all enemies and increases P.DMG taken by [20%->15%] for 5sec.

1.from: Increases the increased P.DMG the enemies take by an additional 20%.
1.to: Changes Physical DMG taken by enemies to 30%.
1.unified: Changes Physical DMG taken by enemies to 30%.

2.from: Reduces Cooldown by 7 sec and increase P.DMG Boost by an additional 20%.
2.unified: Reduces cooldown by 7 sec [(removed) and increase P.DMG Boost by an additional 20%].
